file_level_decisions.rationale: Moved Day21 submission assets into the required structure and removed redundant legacy copies once the canonical files existed.
CSV review copies duplicated the same scenario rows. JSON remains the only source of truth for grading and future merges.

row_level_decisions.rationale: Both source rows target C01. The kept row is the slightly clearer anchor example for review, while the collapsed row is a near-duplicate paraphrase with the same expected behavior and set type.
